prompt: Create a dynamic vertical anime action illustration of a fierce young female martial artist in a traditional Japanese dojo, captured at a low tilted camera angle with cinematic motion blur. She has long flowing pink hair whipping violently through the air, sharp green eyes, bandaged fists, and a white karate gi with a black belt, the gi loosened from movement but still martial and battle-ready. She is lunging forward in a powerful spinning kick or rush attack across tatami mats, kicking up dust, straw fibers, splinters, and wind trails. To the right, a large rectangular tatami mat shield or practice target is thrown upright and tilted diagonally, its woven surface scraping the floor and bursting with sparks and debris as it blocks incoming weapons. Include exactly 12 visible metal shuriken: 8 embedded in or striking the upright tatami shield, 2 flying near the character’s hair and upper body, and 2 scattered or skimming near the floor in the foreground. The dojo interior has wooden beams, shoji windows, warm late-afternoon sunlight, deep shadows, shelves and training objects in the background, and a damaged tatami floor. Use high-detail cinematic anime realism, dramatic backlighting, glowing rim light through the hair, flying particles, shallow depth of field, intense speed lines, and a sense of impact frozen in time. No text, no watermark, no extra characters.
